name: repo-requirements-plugin
description: Adds a /repo-requirements skill that interactively elicits and documents software requirements (functional + non-functional) into docs/requirements/ as a structured set of short, focused markdown files. Designed as a highly interactive multi-session workflow grounded in Volere, ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148, ISO 25010, INCOSE, BABOK, and RFC 2119. Captures every assumption and every out-of-scope decision explicitly to prevent the inaccurate-requirements failure mode that causes project blow-outs.
